---
title: "On Measurement as Infrastructure"
date: 2026-03-12
description: "Why measurement theory is the hidden scaffolding of empirical science."
categories: [measurement, meta-research]
---

Measurement is not a sidebar to science - it is the infrastructure that makes discovery legible. When we get measurement wrong, we silently corrupt every downstream inference.

This essay outlines a pragmatic view of measurement: treat it as a public good, document its assumptions, and design it for reuse.
